title: phalocallis gracilis
intro: Phalocallis gracilis, also known as the delicate orchid tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Phalaenopsis and is native to Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve respiratory health. The plant's health benefits are said to include relieving symptoms of bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Phalocallis gracilis is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, with the roots and leaves being used to make herbal teas and poultices.
